stage: S5 (Multi-board Depth & Benefit Parity) / P01 事件、实体和跨板块关系

value.user_value: Cross-board evidence relations connect policy/papers/standards/patents/statistics/pilots/procurement, but only along a bounded, evidence-backed vocabulary. Every saved relation carries the source document id and the quoted fragment that supports it; an assertion without evidence is explicitly marked inferred_unsaved and never stored as a fact; off-vocabulary relations and unknown board kinds are refused. No boundless knowledge graph, no unfounded edges.
value.why_it_matters: Cross-board depth is where a knowledge system either becomes authoritative or becomes a hallucinated graph. Requiring document/fragment evidence for every edge, and refusing anything off-vocabulary, keeps the relation layer trustworthy rather than speculative.

cost.note: unknown != 0; a deterministic relation layer over curated assertions -> 0 cloud cost.

deployment: NOT_DEPLOYED (relation types + evidence rules + query examples; production worker/cron/data untouched, live build unchanged b189d3cc0703 == T040)
